variants.title: Fleetguard AF25733 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P787408
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25733 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.

variants.title: Donaldson P787408 Air Panel
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P787408 Air Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
